scenarios.idealSpecificInput: Plan a webhook notification system for the billing module. Users need real-time payment status updates. Done when: events fire on charge/refund/dispute, retries on failure, dashboard shows delivery status.
Refactor the config reader from a single 500-line file into separate parse/validate/merge modules. Motivation: complexity exceeds ESLint threshold. Scope: src/cli/config/ only.
Improve the dashboard load time - currently 3s on first paint. Target: under 1s. Focus on the preset list rendering and scan data fetch.
